history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, black and white, low-angle shot of a person wearing glasses and a hoodie. The person's face is partially obscured by their hand, which is resting near their mouth and chin. They have dark, tousled hair peeking out from under the hood of the light-colored hoodie. The glasses are dark-rimmed and rectangular, with a slight sheen on the lenses. A simple, thin band ring is visible on the ring finger of the hand. The lighting is soft and directional, casting subtle shadows that highlight the contours of the face and hand. The overall mood is contemplative, introspective, and slightly mysterious. The background is a plain, soft-focus light color, ensuring the subject remains the focal point. The image has a high-contrast monochrome aesthetic, with deep blacks and bright whites.
